Package com.rays.form

Class CollegeForm

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.BaseForm<CollegeDTO>
      • com.rays.form.CollegeForm
  • public class CollegeForm
extends BaseForm<CollegeDTO>
    Form class for handling College add and update requests in the ORS application.

    Extends BaseForm parameterized with CollegeDTO and carries college-related input fields submitted from the client. Validation constraints are applied to ensure all required fields are provided in the correct format.

    Author:
    Krati Trivedi

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private @NotEmpty(message="Address is required") java.lang.String address
      The address of the college.
      private @NotEmpty(message="City is required") java.lang.String city
      The city in which the college is located.
      private @NotEmpty(message="Name is required") java.lang.String name
      The name of the college.
      private @NotNull(message="Phone No is required") @Pattern(regexp="(^$|[0-9]{10})") java.lang.String phoneNo
      The contact phone number of the college.
      private @NotEmpty(message="State is required") java.lang.String state
      The state in which the college is located.

    • Field Detail

      • name

        @NotEmpty(message="Name is required")
private @NotEmpty(message="Name is required") java.lang.String name
        The name of the college. Must not be empty.

      • address

        @NotEmpty(message="Address is required")
private @NotEmpty(message="Address is required") java.lang.String address
        The address of the college. Must not be empty.

      • state

        @NotEmpty(message="State is required")
private @NotEmpty(message="State is required") java.lang.String state
        The state in which the college is located. Must not be empty.

      • city

        @NotEmpty(message="City is required")
private @NotEmpty(message="City is required") java.lang.String city
        The city in which the college is located. Must not be empty.

      • phoneNo

        @NotNull(message="Phone No is required")
@Pattern(regexp="(^$|[0-9]{10})")
private @NotNull(message="Phone No is required") @Pattern(regexp="(^$|[0-9]{10})") java.lang.String phoneNo
        The contact phone number of the college. Must not be null and must be exactly 10 digits or empty.

      • getDto

        public CollegeDTO getDto()
        Constructs and returns a CollegeDTO populated with the form's field values.

        Initializes the DTO using BaseForm.initDTO(com.rays.common.BaseDTO) to set the ID appropriately for add or update operations, then maps all form fields onto the DTO.

        Overrides:
        getDto in class BaseForm<CollegeDTO>
        Returns:
        a fully populated CollegeDTO instance
